tweets.text:
A man spends 50 years teaching at MIT.

He knows his time is running out.

So he records one last lecture — everything he knows, distilled into a single hour.

He died 5 months later.

This is that lecture.

The most important hour you'll watch this week. 👇
Bookmark it for later https://t.co/SssXO6FZdX https://t.co/2yKG2mSPab
tweets.name: Rohit

tweets.text:
AI has become incredibly good at generating content.

The next challenge is getting it to reliably interact with the physical world.

Excited to see how LingBot 2.0 approaches that. https://t.co/awf055djWq
tweets.name: Rohit

tweets.text:

tweets.text: Instead of watching an hour of Netflix, watch this 2-hour Stanford lecture, which will teach you more about how LLMs like ChatGPT and Claude are built than most people working at top AI companies learn in their entire careers. https://t.co/Nddyv9anm6 https://t.co/2yKG2mSPab
